title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group:
Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
